title: Average Calculator
description: Ask the user for three test scores. Calculate the average and print it formatted to 2 decimal places.
starterCode:
s1 = int(input("Score 1: "))
s2 = int(input("Score 2: "))
s3 = int(input("Score 3: "))

# Calculate and print average
solution:
s1 = int(input("Score 1: "))
s2 = int(input("Score 2: "))
s3 = int(input("Score 3: "))
avg = (s1 + s2 + s3) / 3
print(f"Average: {avg:.2f}")
